# Konstantin Peselev — Senior Product Manager

> Senior Product Manager with 10+ years building B2B SaaS. Most recently leading Growth, Data Governance, and AI roadmaps at Totango (which acquired Catalyst). Based in Philadelphia, with regular time in NYC.

## About
- Personal website: https://peselev.com

- Email: peselevk@gmail.com

## Education
- Executive MBA, NYU Stern School of Business
- MS & BS, Electrical Engineering, Moscow Power Engineering Institute
